cars.title: Sol Navis Cars
cars.desc: Sol Navis specializes in buying and selling used and exotic cars, with an emphasis on quality and verified EU origin. With over 15 years of import experience, we offer reliable vehicles and flexible payment options including leasing and installment plans. Our goal is to provide a safe and transparent purchase with professional support throughout the entire process.

hero.title: We import cars on customer order
hero.desc: We offer a complete transport service from the European Union and manage the entire process through to registration. Our long-standing experience guarantees safety and a premium concierge service. Vehicle buyout is also available.

credit.title: Card Payments
credit.desc: We enable card payments in up to 60 installments via Premium Visa and Diners cards with maximum flexibility for our clients.

leasing.title: Leasing Partners
leasing.desc: We work with all leasing companies in Croatia, with notable partnerships with OTP Leasing and Erste Leasing.

transport.title: EU Transport
transport.desc: Transport service from any part of the EU. Complete handling of documentation, customs clearance and homologation through to registration.

yachts.title: Sol Navis Nautics
yachts.desc: Specialized in yacht sales, service and charter, we provide a complete nautical service from purchase and maintenance to consulting and voyage planning. We build your trust through experience, expertise and premium support at sea and on land.

hero.title: The World of Nautics and Sales
hero.desc: Representatives of renowned sailboats and yachts, both new and used.

sales.title: Yacht Sales & Representation
sales.desc: Authorized representatives of renowned brands including Blumar Yachts and Salona sailboats

service.title: Service & Maintenance
service.desc: Complete vessel care from repairs to annual maintenance and transfers

charter.title: Charter & Consulting
charter.desc: Vessel rental, charter services and expert nautical and shipbuilding consulting

about.label: About Us & Our Expertise
about.title: Premium Nautical Specialists
about.desc: Sol Navis is a leading expert in yacht sales and servicing on the Adriatic, combining a passion for the sea with top technical knowledge. Through the projects Yachtsincroatia.com and Yachtsinmontenegro.com, launched in 2011, our team of experts in nautics, programming, digital design, marketing and economics provides centralized information on nautics and tourism in Croatia and Montenegro, including companies, agencies, marinas, beaches, locations and charter offerings.

cta.title: Looking for a vessel?
cta.desc: Browse our current selection of new and used vessels on our official store.

intervention.title: Sea Interventions
intervention.desc: Fast interventions and vessel towing (YIC SEA ASSIST holder). Our team is ready to respond in the shortest possible time.

repair.title: Repairs & Maintenance
repair.desc: Complete hull, interior, mechanical and electrical repairs. Authorized REX and BOAT CARE partners.

assessment.title: Damage & Value Assessment
assessment.desc: Expert damage inspection and precise market value assessment for insurance or purchase purposes.

consulting.title: Consulting & Support
consulting.desc: We guide you through vessel registration, import/export documentation and offer expert consulting for shipbuilding and charter management.

charter.title: Charter & Education
charter.desc: From luxury weekly rentals to professional training. We offer skipper courses and boat captain licenses.

partners.title: Key Partners
partners.desc: We work with the most trusted names in the industry to ensure the highest level of service.

directions.title: Investment Areas
directions.residentialDesc: We specialize in developing exclusive apartment units and modern homes that combine high aesthetics with a Mediterranean feel. Focus is on premium locations along the Adriatic coast.
directions.strategicDesc: We explore and realize opportunities beyond classic residential construction, including land development, commercial spaces and innovative tourism concepts with high growth potential.

hero.title: Sol Navis
hero.tagline: Investments across various sectors and partnerships on projects in tourism, construction and hospitality.
hero.desc: Investments across various sectors and partnerships on projects in tourism, construction and hospitality.

investments.title: Sol Navis Investments
investments.subtitle: A reliable partner for real estate investments on the Adriatic coast and beyond.
investments.desc: From concept to key handover, we ensure the highest standards of execution and aesthetic perfection with expert market analysis.

service1.title: Design & Construction
service1.desc: From concept to key handover, we ensure the highest standards of execution and aesthetic perfection.

service2.title: Investment Consulting
service2.desc: We provide expert real estate market analysis and guide you through the process of profitable investments in houses and apartments.

hero.title: Contact
hero.desc: Our advisors are at your disposal for all inquiries regarding luxury acquisitions and services.

investments.label: Development & Construction
investments.title: Sol Navis Investments
investments.desc: We shape the future of modern living through strategic investments in real estate and construction projects.
investments.housingDesc: We specialize in developing high-quality residential units and apartments in the most attractive locations along the Adriatic coast.
investments.consultingDesc: We provide investment advisory services and project management from initial concept to final realization and market sale.

cars.label: Premium Vehicles
cars.title: Automobiles
cars.desc: Our automotive department is focused on the sale and purchase of premium used vehicles. We specialize in custom imports, guiding clients through the entire process — from EU selection to registration in Croatia.
cars.logisticsDesc: Complete transport and administration service, including all customs and tax procedures upon import.
cars.paymentDesc: Cooperation with all major leasing companies (OTP, Erste) with the option of card payments in up to 60 installments.

nautics.label: Vessel Department
nautics.title: Nautical & Maritime
nautics.p1: Sol Navis d.o.o. Split is a company specialized in vessel sales and service, representing vessel brands for Croatia, BiH, Montenegro and Serbia — Blumar Yachts, Salona sailboats and Maestral inflatables.
nautics.p2: We are HRB-authorized for repairs of plastic and wooden vessels, working with all insurance companies for damage assessments. Our Sea Assistance service is available 24/7.
nautics.accreditationsDesc: HRB Authorized Service Center for vessel repair and maintenance.

hero.title: About Us
hero.desc: The company was founded by Ante Ćurković in 2009 and since then we have recorded continuous and stable growth, with increasing recognition on the market as a reliable, professional and secure business partner.
